title: fragaria norvegica
intro: Fragaria norvegica, also known as Norwegian strawberry or wild strawberry, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fragaria norvegica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Fragaria norvegica is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed raw as a fresh fruit or used in jams and preserves.
